welcome_message:
Welcome to AgentOps Stacks. This template creates a Databricks Asset Bundle for AI agent projects.
After initialization, run 'uv run setup' to select and install your agent framework.

input_project_name.pattern_match_failure_message: Project name must be at least 3 characters long and cannot contain the following characters: "\", "/", " " and ".".

success_message:
*** Your AgentOps Stack has been created in the '{{.input_root_dir}}' directory. ***

Next steps:
  1. cd {{.input_root_dir}}
  2. uv run setup          # Select and install your agent framework
  3. Edit databricks.yml   # Set workspace hosts and Unity Catalog config
  4. databricks bundle validate -t dev
  5. databricks bundle deploy -t dev
